onboarding.trackLikePro: Track Your Portfolio Like a Pro
onboarding.importDesc: Import transactions, analyze fundamentals, and get AI-powered insights — all in one place.
onboarding.everythingYouNeed: Everything you need to manage and analyze your investment portfolio.
onboarding.featureImportDesc: Upload an Excel file or add transactions manually to build your portfolio.
onboarding.featureAIDesc: Get detailed growth, valuation, and financial health reports powered by AI.
onboarding.featureDCFDesc: See fair-value estimates, margin of safety, and discounted cash flow models.
onboarding.featureTrackDesc: Real-time prices, dividends, allocation charts, and performance metrics.
onboarding.checklistSubtitle: Here's what to do after you sign in — we'll guide you every step of the way.
onboarding.checkLookUpStock: Look up a stock for analysis
onboarding.expertiseSubtitle: This controls which features and tabs you see. You can change this anytime in Settings.
onboarding.normalDesc: Perfect for everyday investors who want a clean, simple experience.
onboarding.normalWho1: New to investing or prefer simplicity
onboarding.intermediateDesc: For investors who want deeper insights and analytical tools.
onboarding.advancedDesc: Full access to every tool, metric, and advanced feature.
onboarding.advancedWho2: Want full control over all features
onboarding.addFirstTxnDesc: Add your first transaction to unlock your dashboard and start tracking.
onboarding.fastestWay: Fastest way — upload your broker statement
onboarding.enterFirstTxn: Enter your first transaction by hand
onboarding.txnAddedDesc: Your transaction has been added. Here's what you can do next:
onboarding.portfolioReady: Your portfolio is ready. Explore all features at your own pace.
onboarding.importRetry: Please try again with a valid Excel file.
onboarding.oneMoreTask: One more task to unlock full features!

backup.title: Backup & Restore
backup.description: Export your portfolio data as an Excel file, or import transactions from a backup.
backup.exportDesc: Download a full Excel backup of all transactions, deposits, holdings, and snapshots.
backup.restoreDesc: Upload an Excel backup (.xlsx) to restore all data — stocks, transactions, cash deposits, and snapshots.
backup.replaceWarning: Replace mode will delete ALL existing data (stocks, transactions, cash deposits, snapshots) before importing.
backup.cannotReachServer: Cannot reach server. Please check your connection.
backup.fileImportWebOnly: File import is available on web. Please use the web version to import Excel files.

planner.title: Financial Planner
planner.sensitivityDesc: How required payment changes with different rates and periods.

integrity.title: Data Integrity
integrity.description: Run automated checks to detect data inconsistencies, missing records, and calculation errors.

reconciliation.title: Cash Reconciliation
reconciliation.subtitle: Reconcile {{portfolio}} cash position
reconciliation.sectionDesc: Detect discrepancies between manual cash entries and system calculations, identify income-harvesting withdrawals, and apply opening balance adjustments.
reconciliation.flaggedDesc: These withdrawals closely match preceding income events and may represent income harvesting. Uncheck to keep as normal withdrawals.
reconciliation.openingBalanceDesc: A dynamic opening balance will be injected to reconcile the difference between your manual deposits and system calculations.
reconciliation.orphanedSellsDesc: These sell transactions are for stocks you no longer hold. They may be artifacts of incomplete historical data — the matching buy was never imported.
reconciliation.deleteConfirmDesc: You are about to permanently delete the following transactions. This cannot be undone. These are likely artifacts from incomplete historical transaction data.
reconciliation.deleteConfirmNote: This action is irreversible. Only proceed if you are sure these transactions do not belong in your records.
reconciliation.withdrawalDesc: These withdrawal transactions were imported but you may not have the full historical data. Select the ones you want to remove.

settingsScreen.priceUpdatesDescFull: Trigger a manual price update for all stocks from configured sources.
settingsScreen.fillAllPwFields: Please fill in all password fields

settingsScreen.resetDescription: Permanently delete all your portfolio data including holdings, transactions, deposits, snapshots, and settings. This cannot be undone.
settingsScreen.resetConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete ALL your portfolio data — holdings, transactions, deposits, snapshots, and settings. Your account will be reset to a fresh state. This action cannot be undone.
settingsScreen.resetSuccess: All data has been deleted. Your account is now fresh.

importCash.updateCashDesc: Go to the Holdings page and click "Edit Cash Position" to set your actual cash balance. This ensures your portfolio value is accurate.
importCash.enterCashDesc: Enter your current cash balance in KFH Trade. You can find this on your account summary page. This helps keep your portfolio value accurate.
importCash.cashTip: Check your KFH Trade account for the exact cash amount. You can skip this and update it later from the Holdings page.

kfhTrade.howToSave: How to save KFH statement correctly
kfhTrade.ifNotAccepted: If the system does not accept the file:
kfhTrade.openInExcel: Open the KFH statement in Excel
kfhTrade.kfhTip: KFH Trade exports statements as HTML files...

kfhImport.importantNote: KFH downloads the statement as a web page (.xls), not a real Excel file. You must re-save it as Excel first.
kfhImport.step1: Log in to KFH Trade and go to Account Statement
kfhImport.step2: Switch the KFH page language to English
kfhImport.step4: Open the downloaded file in Excel
kfhImport.step5: Click File → Save As → choose "Excel Workbook (.xlsx)"
kfhImport.step6: Save the file, then click Upload below
kfhImport.tipText: The English version of the statement works better. Make sure to save as .xlsx — the original .xls from KFH will not import correctly.
kfhImport.bonusSharesMessage: KFH statements do not include bonus shares (stock dividends). If you received any, please add them manually from the Add Transaction screen.

portfolioHealth.title: Portfolio Health
portfolioHealth.somewhatConcentrated: Somewhat concentrated — consider adding more stocks
portfolioHealth.tooConcentrated: Too concentrated — try spreading across more stocks
portfolioHealth.lowCash: Very low cash — keep some for emergencies
portfolioHealth.flatReturns: Returns are flat — be patient or review your stocks
portfolioHealth.portfolioDown: Portfolio is down — don't panic, review your positions

historical.noData: Save daily snapshots to see historical performance data
historical.needMoreData: Need at least 2 years of data to display chart
